name: Arun Rajput

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: "I Didn't Hear a Bell"
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an attack targeting this model is resolved, this model may drain a (soulstone) to heal 2 and deal 2 damage to the attacker.

actions.name: Fist of Unmaking
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model chooses whether this action is resisted by Df, Wp, or Sp.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Buffeted by Wind
triggers.text: Move models damaged by this action up to 2".

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Inside Fighting
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. Target declares an attack action.

actions.name: Good Fundamentals
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Target declares the Prepare action.

triggers.name: Tag Team
triggers.text: Place this model in base contact with the target. Then, this model may declare a (melee) action against a model engaging the target, which receives a (fortitude).

triggers.name: I've Got Your Back!
triggers.text: Engaged ally only. Target is placed in base contact with this model.

extraction_notes: Fist of Unmaking has 'X' as resist value, which is unusual but correct per card text stating the model chooses Df, Wp, or Sp
